name: Chung Hung Steel Corporation
summary: Chung Hung Steel Corporation manufactures and sells steel products in Taiwan, Asia, the United States, Europe, and internationally. The company offers hot-rolled steel coils, cold-rolled steel coils, hot-dipped galvanized steel coils, JIS steel pipes, ASTM steel pipes, API steel pipes, and PE coated steel pipes. Its products are used in steel pipes, sports equipment, bicycles, umbrellas, oil drums, electroplated pipes, home appliances and automobile parts, furniture, floor plates, piping and plumbing, mechanical structure, piling, construction equipment, pallet, garden tube, and display stand, as well as pipe products for pipeline transportation. The company was formerly known as Yieh Loong Enterprise Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Chung Hung Steel Corporation in July 2004. Chung Hung Steel Corporation was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan. Chung Hung Steel Corporation is a subsidiary of China Steel Corporation.
